label: The Ashen Lateen
description: The Ashen Lateen is a river-going sailing vessel adapted to Cyrenth Vale’s cold, veiled light, its hull plated with riveted iron bands over weathered timber. A single lateen rig rises above a low, fortified bulwark line, with shuttered lantern boxes and chain-shot racks built into the rails for siege-ward travel. Its decks are sealed by canvas-and-leather dodgers to blunt ashfall and auroral grit, while carved devotionals and warning glyphs mark the companionways as sanctioned spaces. The ship’s profile remains austere and utilitarian, reflecting the fortress-world’s culture of endurance and guarded transit.
